text: Did you know that Sanrio has created over 450 characters since 1962?
And each one has its own personality, backstory, and fan-base.
Kuromi is a rabbit wearing a black jester's hat with a pink skull on the front and a black devil's tail.
She is one of the antagonists trying to turn people's dreams into nightmares.
Kuromi is mischievous, rebellious, and tomboyous.
Moving on to Cinamoroll.
Before we start, here's a question for you all.
Do you think Cinamoroll is a girl or a boy?
Pause the video and comment your answer and come back.
Cinamoroll is a white puppy with long ears who can fly.
Cinamoroll is a boy puppy who was born on a cloud far up in the sky on March 6, 2002.
Next up is My Melody.
My Melody is a white rabbit with a red hood that covers her ear.
She is one of the oldest Sanrio characters born in 1975.
Just one year after Hello Kitty.
She is very sweet, innocent, and friendly.
My melody loves baking cookies, eating almond pound cake, and playing the piano.
She also likes to collect things that are shaped like star.
Her birthday is January 18th, which makes her a Capricorn.
Cinamoroll is very curious, and loves to explore a new place.
He also likes to drink milk and eat cinnamon rolls.
His name comes from his plump and curly tail that resembles a cinnamon roll.
This tape is perfect for decorating your notebooks, planners, or anything else that needs some edgy flare.
Kuromi loves riding her motorcycle and playing pranks on others.
She also has a soft spot for handsome guys and cute things.
Kuromi's birthday is on Halloween, which suits her spooky style.
If you have long hair, you know how annoying it is when you forget your hair tie.
Well, this Kuromi bracelet is also a hair tie, so use it as an accessory and also use it to tie your hair.
